data.name: U.F.F.C 天下第一色色武道會
data.detailed_description:
◆ 劇情介紹

準備好迎接年度最狂野、最淫穢、最離譜的——天下第一色色武道會！這場3D性技武道會將揉合令人捧腹的黑色幽默與令人心跳加速極致淫穢的武道交流完美融合，定會讓你硬得只能用上單手遊玩此遊戲！扮演傲嬌無理的特朗姆總統，用她一系列令人無法抗拒的性技招式，例如令人震驚的“稅務打樁機”和令人瞠目結舌的“進出口天堂“牛仔式動作，並以此榨乾隔壁鄰居甚至世界領導人等參賽者們的關稅！

在這場扣人心弦、令人熱血沸騰的冒險中，你將探索特朗姆在「天下第一色色武道會」裡從本地比賽到世界杯等不同的聯賽中離譜且淫穢的一面，並以她的性高潮性技制服各路好漢。每一次激情勝利，你都能獲得令人垂涎的關稅，並用它來解鎖特朗姆大人更多令人硬爆的能力，以確保她在賽事中佔據高位！

你能幫助特朗姆總統征服世界，並讓「偉大國家」再次偉大嗎？自由世界的命運懸而未決，只有你才能決定誰能最終勝出！準備好在這獨一無二的遊戲中盡情歡笑、驚呼、硬硬，並成為天下第一色色武道會的「濕匠」了嗎？遊戲開始！



◆ 遊戲玩法

在U.F.F.C比賽中，你將挑戰形形色色的對手，從當地流浪漢到世界領袖，應有盡有。每位挑戰者都有獨特的個性和特質，確保每場【交流】都能帶來全新色色的體驗。你將不斷晉級聯賽，解鎖新的挑戰，或透過累積「關稅」來鞏固特朗姆作為終極冠軍的地位。

掌握各種獨特的姿勢、技能和子技能，並獲得SSS等級以提升你的分數和關稅。每場比賽結束後，你可以選擇實行[ICE驅除作戰]來驅除帝國的非法怪物並以此獲得更多資金，[學習]你的私密技能來提升你的色色表現，或在[畫廊]記憶你的記憶來揭開隱藏的故事，最終解鎖神秘角色。



◆ 遊戲特色

◇ 引人硬爆的動畫CG與過場動畫
◇ 超過20個獨特的對手
◇ 引人入勝的對話，充滿幽默的政治幽默和成人主題
◇ 多個詼諧、諷刺的遊戲結局
◇ 刺激的生存遊戲[ICE驅除戰鬥]
◇ NewGame+ 模式，包含可玩角色和隱藏故事等額外可解鎖獎勵內容

data.short_description: 飾演無與倫比的世界領袖-特朗姆總統，在【U.F.F.C - 天下第一色色武道會】中一路奮鬥。運用你令人硬爆起立的招式如「關稅之犬」、「進出口天堂」等等，以榨取隔壁鄰居甚至世界領導人等參賽者們的關稅與油田，幫她實現讓偉大國家「M.E.G.A」再次偉大的目標！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN10/WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 5 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN10/WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 11.0 or higher
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 11.0 or higher
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or higher
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: U.F.F.C - Ultra Fuckin’ Fuckable Championship
data.detailed_description:
◆ Story

Get ready for the wildest, most filthy and outrageous game of the year - “U.F.F.C, the Ultra Fuckin’ Fuckable Championship”! This 3D extravaganza combines side-splitting dark humor with heart-racing erotic action that will leave you wet and breathless. Step into the stilettos of the one and only President Lord Trumy, the unrivaled master of the Art of Erotic, as she sets out on a globe-trotting quest to seduce the world's most powerful leaders using her arsenal of irresistible moves like the scandalous Tax-Butt Slam and the jaw-dropping Import-Export Ecstasy.

In this pulse-pounding, hip-thrusting adventure, you'll navigate the erotic side of the U.F.F.C, battling your way through different leagues like local matches and World Cups, where your sexual finesse will be put to the ultimate test. With every sultry victory, you'll earn coveted tariffs, the currency of conquest, which you can use to unlock even more mind-blowing abilities for Trumy, ensuring she's always wet and stays on top—both figuratively and literally!

Will you help Lord Trumy bend the world to her will and make the “M.E.G.A” Great Again? The fate of the free world hangs in the balance, and only you can decide who will come out on top! Get ready to laugh, gasp, and blush your way through this one-of-a-kind gaming experience that promises to be the talk of the town. Are you ready to take on the challenge and become the Ultra Fuckin’ Fuckable Champion? Let the games begin!



◆ Gameplay

Face off against a diverse array of opponents ranging from local hoboes to world leaders in the U.F.F.C matches. Each challenger possesses unique personalities and traits ensuring a fresh experience with every encounter while you progress through the leagues and unlock new challenges, or characters by accumulate "Tariffs" to solidify your position as the ultimate champion.

Master a variety of distinct poses, skills, and subskills to earn an SSS grading, boosting your score and Tariffs. After each match, you have the option of selecting between [Operation ICE Breaking] to generate revenue by expelling extraterrestrial beings on behalf of your nation,
[Training] your intimate skills to enhance your performance, or memorizing the memories in [Gallery] to uncover hidden stories and ultimately unlock secret characters.



◆ Game Features

◇ Engaging Animated CGs and cutscenes
◇ Multiple opponents, each with unique traits
◇ Captivating dialogue filled with humor, strategy, and adult themes
◇ Multiple witty, satirical game endings
◇ Dive in「Operation ICE Breaking」, a captivating survival game to earn money to unlock more sex skills.
◇ NewGame+ mode with additional unlockable bonus content, including playable characters and hidden stories

  • Memory: 5 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card

  • OS: WIN10/WIN11
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 8 GB available space

  • Processor: Apple M1 or higher
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
mac_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS: 11.0 or higher
  • Processor: Apple M1 or higher
